title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by Claude API and Claude Code that helps sales reps draft customer replies in their own voice. The tool was created by Jared Sires, a GTM Product Manager, to reduce administrative burden on sales teams.
